MASTER COURT CALENDAR OF MAY-16-2011 ASSIGNED TO SHORT CAUSE TRIAL CALENDAR ON MAY-16-2011 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 501, RONALD E QUIDACHAY, TO PUT TERMS OF THE SETTLEMENT ON THE RECORD. ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT KIMBERLY HATHAWAY, DBA HATHAWAY PUBLIC RELATIONS

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THOR 760M, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KIMBERLY HATHAWAY, DBA HATHAWAY PUBLIC RELATIONS THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 760 MARKET STREET, SUITES 	07 & 	23, SAN FRANCISCO, CALIFORNIA 94102 $5,576.62 RENT, $4,800.00 ATTORNEY FEES, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,376.62, STAYED UNTIL MAY-31-2011, IF THE DEFENDANT VACATES BY MAY 31, 2011 THEN THE $200 ELEVATOR TECHNICIAN FEE AND THE $43.73 PER DIEM FROM 03/01/11 SHALL BE WAIVED. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
